sections.paragraph: i.q. בָּלָה to fall away-(a) used of clothes falling to pieces from use, and from being moth-eaten (see עָשׁ , عُشّةُ a moth, whence عَثَّ to gnaw as a moth).-(b) used of the face, as having become lean through sickness or care (einfallen, verfallen), Psa 6:8 31:10 , 11 Psa 31:11. Arab. عَشَّ to fall away, to become lean.
